name: Tomato Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds ripe fresh tomatoes, peeled and seeded
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the peeled and seeded tomatoes finely.
2. Combine the chopped tomatoes with olive oil, vinegar, chives, tarragon, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
3. Mix until well combined.
Yield: 2 cups
